# ioSize

**Instance Property**

A property for the optimal block size with which to perform I/O.

## Declaration

```swift
var ioSize: Int { get set }
```

## Discussion

For best performance, specify an `ioSize` that’s an even multiple of [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSStatFSResult/blockSize].
title: ioSize
